scene_title: Tábua de pedra com código binário
narrative_beat: As antigas tábuas da lei reescritas em linguagem de máquina — os mandamentos gravados em pedra agora brilham com código binário, a lei do homem substituída pela lei da máquina

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: slight low-angle at 15 degrees looking up
shot.depth_of_field: tablet stone sharp, hands and background blurred

subject.primary: ancient stone tablet simultaneously bearing cuneiform engravings and glowing binary code superimposed in gold across the surface, cracks in the stone glowing crimson as if filled with lava
subject.focal_point: the central face of the tablet where ancient script and glowing binary code overlap
subject.secondary: weathered prophetic hands in aged skin holding the tablet from below, barely visible at bottom frame edge
props: cuneiform ancient script carved deep into stone
golden binary code glowing over cuneiform
crimson glowing cracks in stone surface
floating orange embers rising from glowing cracks

environment.location: modern government archive room or national library vault
environment.atmosphere: the ancient law superseded by machine law — humanity's foundation being overwritten

composition.rule: centered monumental — tablet fills frame vertically, hands barely visible at bottom, Ken Burns slow tilt-up from base to top of tablet
composition.foreground: the tablet stone in warm amber and crimson tones, glowing binary code
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white government archive room — filing cabinets, document shelves, archival boxes, preservation glass cases

lighting.key_light: amber warm glow emanating from within the glowing binary code on the tablet surface
lighting.fill_light: cold desaturated institutional archive lighting from above barely reaching tablet edges
lighting.rim_light: crimson glow from the cracked lines in the stone providing dramatic underlighting
lighting.mood: the overwriting of human law — ancient authority confronting digital supremacy

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: solemn dread — the replacement of human and divine law with machine law

symbolism.primary: cuneiform and binary code on the same tablet — the oldest human law and the newest, both being superseded
symbolism.secondary: crimson glowing cracks represent the fracturing of human civilization's legal and moral foundations

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
